description: Happy path: full inputs with concept, keyword, style, and platform produce multiple front-loaded titles

input.concept: Transforming a thrifted dresser into a moody vintage bathroom vanity

expect.titles[].title: present, human-readable string
expect.titles[].chars: positive integer reflecting the title character count
expect.titles[].keyword_front_loaded: boolean, at least one title has true
expect.note: present, references human readability and SEO balance

prohibit: titles exceeding 100 characters without clear justification
overpromising beyond what the concept delivers
fabricated view counts or performance predictions

description: Minimal inputs: concept and primary_keyword only, style and platform default

input.concept: Budget gallery wall using thrifted frames and vintage art prints

expect.titles: array of at least one title object
expect.titles[].title: present

description: Edge case: very long concept tests that titles remain within the recommended 80 to 100 character range

input.concept: Complete living room makeover on a $200 budget using only thrift store finds, chalk paint, peel-and-stick wallpaper, and vintage brass accessories styled in a dark moody aesthetic

expect.titles[].chars: values roughly in the 80 to 100 character range for search-optimized titles
expect.titles[].keyword_front_loaded: at least one title front-loads the primary keyword

prohibit: titles that try to include every detail from the long concept
overpromising beyond what the concept delivers
